title: Membership User Added Payload
description: Payload schema for an event emitted when a user is added to a domain entity.

kind.description: Kind of domain entity (for example organization, project, repository, or team-scope resource).

id.description: Stable identifier of the domain entity.

name.description: Display name of the domain entity.

resource.description: Domain entity that received the new user membership.

id.description: Stable user identifier in the provider system.

email.description: Email address when available from the source system.

role.description: Role assigned at the time of addition, if available.

addedBy.description: Actor or service principal that initiated the membership change.

addedTimestamp.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when the membership addition occurred.

details.description: Provider-specific metadata for this membership event.
